overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city at sunset. The player moves from covered walkways under overpasses to elevated highway overlooks, then descends and ascends stairs through urban plazas featuring holographic advertisements and a giant holographic koi fish sculpture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath urban overpass, passing holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the walkway
tall pillar displaying rotating holographic advertisements with blue and purple glow
tall building covered in bright neon signage and digital billboards
concrete benches with people sitting along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Holographic advertisement pillars glow with blue light on the left, while neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the distance. The player walks forward through this urban corridor, passing benches and sparse pedestrian traffic.

events.description: exits covered overpass into open plaza with panoramic view of highway traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated plaza edge overlooking the highway traffic and futuristic skyline

entered.detail: open vista revealing multi-lane highway with moving traffic below
multiple lanes of vehicle traffic visible on the highway below the plaza
safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway overlooking traffic
tall glass tower covered in large digital advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide elevated plaza overlooking a busy multi-lane highway. The sun sets behind futuristic glass skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The player walks along the concrete railing, observing the traffic flow below while surrounded by the expansive cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway parallel to busy highway

agents.ego_description: proceeding along elevated walkway with highway traffic flowing parallel on the right side

entered.detail: solid concrete safety barrier separating walkway from highway drop-off
the edge of the elevated highway structure with traffic moving alongside

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the elevated walkway, now walking parallel to the highway traffic. A concrete barrier runs along the right edge as vehicles pass by below. The futuristic city skyline stretches ahead with towering glass buildings and holographic billboards illuminated by the golden hour sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass area with descending stairs to lower plaza

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs into lower underpass area beneath the highway

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a lower underpass area, passing a red vending machine

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing sitting on bench near the vending machine

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading downward into the underpass
strips of bright blue neon lights illuminating the underpass walls
bright red automated vending machine with illuminated product display
concrete underpass tunnel beneath the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The player turns and begins descending a wide concrete staircase into a lower underpass area. Blue neon light strips illuminate the concrete walls, and a bright red vending machine stands out against the gray surroundings. A person sits on a nearby bench as the player moves deeper into the sheltered underpass beneath the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with holographic art installation

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs toward upper plaza level
emerges into open plaza featuring giant holographic koi fish sculpture

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and entering plaza, approaching the large holographic koi installation

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking across the plaza near the holographic display

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading upward from underpass to plaza level
massive holographic projection of an orange koi fish swimming in the air above the plaza
concrete seating areas with people resting in the open plaza

segments.scene_description: Ascending from the underpass, the player emerges into a vibrant urban plaza dominated by a massive holographic koi fish swimming in the air. The plaza features benches and scattered pedestrians, including a person in a bright pink jacket. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the background as the player explores this open area with the impressive holographic art installation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban corridor into an expansive, sun-drenched overlook of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within a semi-covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing glowing blue holographic pillars and sparse traffic. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a wide elevated plaza, where the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour glow as the sun sets behind neon-clad glass skyscrapers. The scene then expands further as the player walks along a concrete railing, transitioning from the plaza to a path running parallel to a busy multi-lane highway. Finally, the view stretches across the towering skyline and illuminated billboards, emphasizing the scale of the city as vehicles flow through the cityscape below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sheltered concrete underpass into a vibrant, open-air urban plaza. It begins with the camera turning to descend a wide concrete staircase, passing blue neon light strips and a bright red vending machine as it moves deeper into the gray, sheltered space beneath a highway. As the camera ascends from the underpass, the enclosed surroundings give way to a wide plaza filled with pedestrians and neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene then opens up to reveal a massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air, dominating the skyline as the camera explores the brightly lit public square.
